financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company did well overall, with some areas growing and others not doing as well.
They have good future opportunities, but they are being careful about their expectations for the next quarter.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: High Risk
bullets: The company is facing challenges with big projects and changes in vendors, which could hurt profits.
Currency changes helped recently, but future shifts might undo these benefits, and the company hasn't shared plans to handle this risk.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Average
bullets: The company is doing okay with its environmental and social efforts, but there's room for improvement.
They are meeting some expectations, but they could do more to be responsible and sustainable.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Good
bullets: The company leaders are mostly positive about future growth, showing confidence in their plans.
They also expressed some concerns about keeping costs under control, which shows a careful approach.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Average
bullets: The company shared some useful numbers but often spoke in general terms without clear plans.
Some questions were answered well, but others were only partially addressed without enough detail.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Very Poor
bullets: The company is being careful despite winning big deals, which makes investors worried.
Challenges in some regions and the need to turn deals into money are causing concern.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Average
bullets: Wipro is doing well with big contracts, but their expected growth is small, which is why the score is average.
They are investing in new technology and partnerships, but these efforts are costly and affecting their profits.
